topic_chinese: 她的汉语说得像中国人一样好

vocabulary.example: 她的汉语说得像中国人一样好。
vocabulary.translation: Her Chinese is as good as a native Chinese speaker.

vocabulary.example: 你说得很地道，像母语一样。
vocabulary.translation: You speak very authentically — just like your mother tongue.

vocabulary.example: 她跑得像风一样快，真赞！
vocabulary.translation: She runs as fast as the wind — amazing!

vocabulary.example: 他的汉语比我还好，我要更努力学习。
vocabulary.translation: His Chinese is even better than mine — I need to study even harder.

vocabulary.example: 他说得比我更流利，真厉害。
vocabulary.translation: He speaks even more fluently than me — truly impressive.

vocabulary.example: 你说得很地道，像母语一样。
vocabulary.translation: You speak very authentically — just like your mother tongue.

vocabulary.example: 他说得比我更流利，真厉害。
vocabulary.translation: He speaks even more fluently than me — truly impressive.

vocabulary.example: 她的进步很大，已经没有口音了。
vocabulary.translation: Her progress is huge — she already has no accent.

vocabulary.example: 你进步很大，已经说得很地道了，真赞！
vocabulary.translation: Your progress is huge — you already speak very authentically. Amazing!

vocabulary.example: 她的进步很大，已经没有口音了。
vocabulary.translation: Her progress is huge — she already has no accent.

vocabulary.example: 你说得很地道，像母语一样。
vocabulary.translation: You speak very authentically — just like your mother tongue.

vocabulary.pinyin: xiàng Zhōng guó rén yí yàng

key_sentences.chinese: 她的汉语说得像中国人一样好。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tā de hàn yǔ shuō de xiàng Zhōng guó rén yí yàng hǎo.
key_sentences.english: Her Chinese is as good as a native Chinese speaker.

key_sentences.chinese: 他说得比我更流利，真厉害。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tā shuō de bǐ wǒ gèng liú lì, zhēn lì hài.
key_sentences.english: He speaks even more fluently than me — truly impressive.

key_sentences.chinese: 她的进步很大，已经没有口音了。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tā de jìn bù hěn dà, yǐ jīng méi yǒu kǒu yīn le.
key_sentences.english: Her progress is huge — she already has no accent.

key_sentences.chinese: 你说得很地道，像母语一样。
key_sentences.pinyin: Nǐ shuō de hěn dì dào, xiàng mǔ yǔ yí yàng.
key_sentences.english: You speak very authentically — just like your mother tongue.

key_sentences.chinese: 她跑得像风一样快，真赞！
key_sentences.pinyin: Tā pǎo de xiàng fēng yí yàng kuài, zhēn zàn!
key_sentences.english: She runs as fast as the wind — amazing!

key_sentences.chinese: 他的汉语比我还好，我要更努力学习。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tā de hàn yǔ bǐ wǒ hái hǎo, wǒ yào gèng nǔ lì xué xí.
key_sentences.english: His Chinese is even better than mine — I need to study even harder.

grammar_points.title: A比B还/更+Adj — A is even more...than B
grammar_points.explanation: A + 比 + B + 还/更 + Adjective means 'A is even more [adjective] than B'. 还 and 更 both intensify the comparison beyond a simple 比 sentence. 还 is slightly more colloquial; 更 is neutral. The degree can be emphasised further with 多了 at the end: 比我更好多了 = much better than me.

examples.pinyin: Tā de hàn yǔ bǐ wǒ hái hǎo.
examples.english: Her Chinese is even better than mine.

examples.pinyin: Jīn tiān bǐ zuó tiān gèng lěng.
examples.english: Today is even colder than yesterday.

exercises.question: Fill in: 他的口音比我___好，几乎没有外国口音。
Which sentence means 'Her progress is even greater than before'?
option_pinyin: Tā de jìn bù bǐ yǐ qián gèng dà.
Tā de jìn bù hěn dà.
Tā de jìn bù hé yǐ qián yí yàng.
Tā de jìn bù méi yǒu yǐ qián dà.

exercises.question: What is the difference between 还 and 更 in 比 comparisons?
exercises.correct: 还 is more colloquial; 更 is neutral — both intensify the comparison
options: 还 is more colloquial; 更 is neutral — both intensify the comparison
还 is used before adjectives; 更 is used after verbs

exercises.question: Translate: 她跑得比我还快。
exercises.correct: She runs even faster than me.
options: She runs even faster than me.
She runs as fast as me.
She and I run at the same speed.

exercises.question: How do you add emphasis meaning 'much more' to a 比 comparison?
exercises.correct: Add 多了 at the end: 比我好多了
options: Add 多了 at the end: 比我好多了
Add 非常 before the adjective
Use 最 instead of 更

grammar_points.title: 像...一样... — Like / As...as...
grammar_points.explanation: 像 + Noun/Pronoun + 一样 + Adj/Verb means 'like [noun], [adjective/verb]'. This pattern is used for similes and comparisons of equality. 她说得像中国人一样好 = She speaks as well as a Chinese person. 他跑得像风一样快 = He runs as fast as the wind. The structure can also omit 一样 when following directly: 像中国人好.

examples.chinese: 她说得像中国人一样好。
examples.pinyin: Tā shuō de xiàng Zhōng guó rén yí yàng hǎo.
examples.english: She speaks as well as a Chinese person.

examples.pinyin: Tā pǎo de xiàng fēng yí yàng kuài.
examples.english: He runs as fast as the wind.

exercises.question: Fill in: 她的汉语___母语___流利。(Her Chinese is as fluent as her mother tongue.)
What does 像风一样快 mean?
Which sentence correctly uses 像...一样?
option_pinyin: Tā chàng de xiàng gē shǒu yí yàng hǎo.
Tā chàng de bǐ gē shǒu yí yàng.
Tā yí yàng chàng de xiàng gē shǒu.
Tā chàng gē xiàng yí yàng hǎo.

exercises.question: Translate: 这里的天气像北京一样冷。
exercises.correct: The weather here is as cold as Beijing.
options: The weather here is as cold as Beijing.
The weather here is colder than Beijing.
The weather here is like summer in Beijing.
Beijing's weather is just like here.

exercises.question: What is the structure of 像...一样?

grammar_points.title: V得+Adj — Degree Complements
grammar_points.explanation: Verb + 得 + Adjective/Adverb describes how well or to what degree an action is performed. This is the degree complement (程度补语). 说得好 = speaks well. 跑得快 = runs fast. 写得很漂亮 = writes very beautifully. Negative form: 说得不好 = doesn't speak well. Note: when an object is present, the verb must be repeated: 汉语说得很好.

examples.pinyin: Tā hàn yǔ shuō de hěn liú lì.

examples.chinese: 他写得不太好，需要多练习。
examples.pinyin: Tā xiě de bú tài hǎo, xū yào duō liàn xí.
examples.english: He doesn't write very well; he needs more practice.

exercises.question: How do you say 'She speaks Chinese very fluently'?
option_pinyin: Tā hàn yǔ shuō de hěn liú lì.
Tā hěn liú lì shuō hàn yǔ.
Tā shuō hàn yǔ de hěn liú lì.
Tā liú lì de shuō hàn yǔ hěn.

exercises.question: Fill in: 他唱歌唱___很好。
What is the negative form of 说得好?
When an object is present, how must the verb be structured?
exercises.correct: The verb must be repeated: 汉语说得很好
options: The verb must be repeated: 汉语说得很好
The object goes after 得: 说得汉语好
The verb is dropped: 汉语得很好
得 comes before the verb: 得说汉语很好

exercises.question: Translate: 她写字写得很漂亮。
options: Her writing is more beautiful than before.

quiz.question: Which word means 'even more' in a comparison?
How do you say 'speaks very fluently'?
What does 像中国人一样 mean?
Fill in: 她的汉语比我___好，进步很大。
What does 进步很大 mean?
What does 没有口音 mean?
Translate: 她汉语说得像母语一样。
quiz.correct: She speaks Chinese like her mother tongue.
options: She speaks Chinese like her mother tongue.
She speaks Chinese better than her mother tongue.
She wants to speak Chinese like a native.

quiz.question: What does 比我更好 mean?
What does 地道的汉语 mean?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 加缪，你的汉语说得真好！像中国人一样，没有口音。
lines.pinyin: Jiā Miù, nǐ de hàn yǔ shuō de zhēn hǎo! Xiàng Zhōng guó rén yí yàng, méi yǒu kǒu yīn.
lines.english: Camus, your Chinese is so good! Just like a native — no accent at all.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 谢谢！我觉得我说得还不够流利，你比我更厉害。
lines.pinyin: Xiè xie! Wǒ jué de wǒ shuō de hái bú gòu liú lì, nǐ bǐ wǒ gèng lì hài.
lines.english: Thanks! I feel I'm still not fluent enough — you're even more impressive than me.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 哪里！你的进步很大，已经说得很地道了，真赞！
lines.pinyin: Nǎ lǐ! Nǐ de jìn bù hěn dà, yǐ jīng shuō de hěn dì dào le, zhēn zàn!
lines.english: Not at all! Your progress is huge — you already speak very authentically. Amazing!

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 你说的话像鼓励一样，让我很开心。我会继续努力。
lines.pinyin: Nǐ shuō de huà xiàng gǔ lì yí yàng, ràng wǒ hěn kāi xīn. Wǒ huì jì xù nǔ lì.
lines.english: Your words are like encouragement — they make me very happy. I'll keep working hard.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 好！你的汉语一定会比现在还好的。
lines.pinyin: Hǎo! Nǐ de hàn yǔ yí dìng huì bǐ xiàn zài hái hǎo de.
lines.english: Great! Your Chinese will definitely get even better than it is now.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 谢谢你！你的鼓励对我很重要。
lines.pinyin: Xiè xie nǐ! Nǐ de gǔ lì duì wǒ hěn zhòng yào.
lines.english: Thank you! Your encouragement means a lot to me.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 梵高，你觉得学汉语难吗？
lines.pinyin: Fàn Gāo, nǐ jué de xué hàn yǔ nán ma?
lines.english: Van Gogh, do you find learning Chinese difficult?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 挺难的，但是我进步了不少。老师说我说得比以前流利多了。
lines.pinyin: Tǐng nán de, dàn shi wǒ jìn bù le bù shǎo. Lǎo shī shuō wǒ shuō de bǐ yǐ qián liú lì duō le.
lines.english: It's quite difficult, but I've made a lot of progress. The teacher said I speak much more fluently than before.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 真的！你的汉语说得像母语一样自然，真厉害。
lines.pinyin: Zhēn de! Nǐ de hàn yǔ shuō de xiàng mǔ yǔ yí yàng zì rán, zhēn lì hài.
lines.english: Really! Your Chinese sounds as natural as your mother tongue — so impressive.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 你比我更好吧！你的口音比我地道多了。
lines.pinyin: Nǐ bǐ wǒ gèng hǎo ba! Nǐ de kǒu yīn bǐ wǒ dì dào duō le.
lines.english: You're even better than me! Your accent is much more native-sounding than mine.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我们互相学习吧，一起进步！
lines.pinyin: Wǒ men hù xiāng xué xí ba, yì qǐ jìn bù!
lines.english: Let's learn from each other and progress together!
